devnet_3_status.highlight: Finalization spec change PR #443 merged—splits votes across blocks for stability
Long-running devnet stable at 20,000+ slots with Lantern/Qlean/Ethlambda
Signature serialization changed to fixed bytes across all clients

devnet_4_progress.highlight: ZK-friendly encoding PR for leanSig nearly ready; blocking DevNet-4 rollout
Recursive aggregation branch for leanMultisig coming after leanSig PR merge

devnet_5_design.highlight: DevNet-5 proposing separate keys for proposer/attester to enable independent signing
Multi-message aggregation possible—single proof for multiple attestation data

networking_and_scale.highlight: P2P topology for subnets >1 needs definition before scaling validators
Block size concern: multiple proofs per block can reach ~1MB
Erasure-coded broadcast from EthP2P research should be integrated for proof propagation

research_updates.highlight: Poseidon-1 optimization: only 1.8x slower than Poseidon-2 in plaintext hashing
Plonky3 v0.5 released with performance improvements
Heat-proof call #8 on Poseidon scheduled for March 20th

action_items.action: Merge ZK-friendly encoding PR in leanSig to unblock DevNet-4
Explore multi-message aggregation API to reduce block size to single proof
Define P2P topology for subnet scaling and validator distribution
Update API and metrics flags for leanQuickStart refactor

decisions.decision: DevNet-5 will use 2 keys per validator (proposer + attester) at genesis
Signature serialization standardized to fixed bytes across all implementations

targets.target: March 20, 2026 - Heat-proof call #8 focused on Poseidon optimizations
